fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`ColorExtensions` provides extension methods for converting colors between SkiaSharp types
(<xref:SkiaSharp.SKColor> and <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorF>) and the HarfBuzz
<xref:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor> type.

These conversions handle the byte-order difference: `HBColor` stores colors in BGRA order
(`0xBBGGRRAA`), while `SKColor` uses ARGB order (`0xAARRGGBB`).
]]></format>
fields.summary: Provides extension methods for converting between SkiaSharp and HarfBuzz color types.

fields.returns: An <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> with the same red, green, blue, and alpha channel values as <paramref name="color" />.
fields.summary: Converts an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColor" /> to an <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" />.

entries.signature: public static HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor ToHBColor (this SkiaSharp.SKColor color);

fields.returns: An <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> with channel values derived from <paramref name="color" />.
fields.summary: Converts an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColorF" /> to an <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" />.

params.color: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColorF" /> to convert. Channel values are clamped to [0, 1] before conversion.

entries.signature: public static HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor ToHBColor (this SkiaSharp.SKColorF color);

fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColor" /> with the same red, green, blue, and alpha channel values as <paramref name="hbColor" />.
fields.summary: Converts an <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> to an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColor" />.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKColor ToSKColor (this HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor hbColor);

fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColorF" /> with channel values normalized to [0, 1] from the 8-bit channel values of <paramref name="hbColor" />.
fields.summary: Converts an <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> to an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColorF" />.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKColorF ToSKColorF (this HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor hbColor);

fields.returns: An array of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColor" /> values corresponding to the input colors.
fields.summary: Converts an array of <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> values to an array of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColor" /> values.

params.hbColors: The array of <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> values to convert.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKColor[] ToSKColors (this HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor[] hbColors);
